message:
Add IPC client tests - daemon coverage 82% → 83%

Comprehensive tests for IPC client functionality:
- NewIPCClient constructor
- Connect: unix socket, TCP fallback, already connected
- Close: connected and not connected scenarios
- Ping, Status, Notify: success and error cases
- Subscribe: success and connection error
- ToRequestStreamEvent: various payload types
- TCP fallback behavior when SLB_HOST set
- Context cancellation handling

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
